summary: Ukrainian operators from the 1st "Azov" Corps are targeting Russian logistics near Donetsk, with drones actively monitoring routes around Zuhres, Andriivka, Starobesheve, Horlivka, Lysychansk, and the Donetsk Ring Road, exposing weaknesses in Russian air defense. On the night of April 16, the SBS Birds conducted a coordinated strike hitting 16 military targets including three air defense systems, two Iskander bases, the Rubicon base, two oil depots, and logistics facilities in Crimea. Meanwhile, Russian forces from the Rubicon Center reported destroying 105 Ukrainian targets on April 16 and 107 on April 15, including personnel and fixed-wing UAVs, while coordinating with the Russian Aerospace Forces to neutralize Ukrainian UAV launch points. On the ground, FPV drones were used to kill Russian soldiers attempting to assault Ukrainian positions on motorcycles and another who feigned surrender before fleeing toward comrades. Ukrainian forces also demonstrated electronic warfare capabilities by interfering with FPV drone operations, and soldiers from the 36th Marine Brigade survived a Russian FPV attack near Kostiantinivka after detecting the threat with a drone detector.
